_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Design, develop, and deliver data and AI training programs for defined organizational audiences, including needs assessment, curriculum development, delivery execution, and effectiveness measurement.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI OP domain. Task OP-T-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-S-002 (OP, cosine: 0.549), LS-T-010 (LS, cosine: 0.466).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.4/10 (raw 0.644). Shared vocabulary: [develop, organizational, training]. NICE-only terms [materials] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, assessment, audiences, curriculum, data, defined] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.879 (P=0.920, R=0.843). P exceeds R by 0.077 — the NICE element's 4 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 23 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Develop organizational training materials" and "Design, develop, and deliver data and AI training programs for defined organizat" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.593 < STS 0.644 (gap -0.051). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [materials] and [ai, assessment, audiences] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.6%. Shared tokens: [develop, organizational, training]. NICE-only: [materials]. WIDAI-only: [ai, assessment, audiences, curriculum, data, defined].
